title: polystichum × rupestris
intro: Polystichum × rupestris, also known as the hybrid rock fern, is a rare and unique species of fern that is a cross between the Polystichum lonchitis and the Polystichum setiferum. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Polystichum × rupestris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by drying and processing the fronds, which can be consumed as tea or used in infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
